name: test-community-fund
description: Community Fund — players contribute currency toward a shared goal. When the threshold is reached the fund resets and completion commands fire.

fundThreshold.description: Target amount that triggers fund completion and reset

minimumContribution.description: Minimum amount a player must contribute per command

completionMessage.default: The community fund has reached {threshold}! Thank you everyone!
completionMessage.description: Broadcast message when threshold is reached. Supports {threshold} placeholder.

completionCommands.description: Raw game server commands executed on fund completion. E.g. Minecraft: 'effect give @a luck 3600'

broadcastContributions.description: Whether to broadcast each contribution to all players

permissions.description: Allows a player to contribute currency to the community fund
Allows a player to view the community fund completion history

fund-contribute.description: Contribute currency to the community fund
fund-contribute.helpText: Contribute currency to the community fund. Amount must be a positive whole number.

arguments.name: amount
arguments.helpText: The amount of currency to contribute

fund-history.description: View the community fund completion history
fund-history.helpText: Shows the number of community fund completions and the last completion details.

fund-status.description: Check the current community fund status
fund-status.helpText: Shows the current community fund total, target, and round count.
